title: Birds stumble in Stellenbosch
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds missed...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds missed the perfect opportunity to advance in the provincial league when they lost 1-0 against Maties FC in a tough Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe League encounter on Friday 14 March in Stellenbosch.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Oriented Birds missed the perfect opportunity to advance in the provincial league when they lost 1-0 against Maties FC in a tough Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe League encounter on Friday 14 March in Stellenbosch."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the first leg, played on Saturday 9 November 2024 at Plett's Kwanokuthula Stadium, Oriented Birds defeated Maties 4-1."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Playoff spot","html":"Playoff spot"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 28 points, the Birds are fighting their way up the log to secure a playoff spot.","html":"With 28 points, the Birds are fighting their way up the log to secure a playoff spot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds have played 15 fixtures, winning eight, drawing four, and losing three.","html":"The Birds have played 15 fixtures, winning eight, drawing four, and losing three."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Cape Winelands Region's Maties are fighting for a top-five position, earning 21 points from 14 games.","html":"The Cape Winelands Region's Maties are fighting for a top-five position, earning 21 points from 14 games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the start of the Birds' game against Maties, both teams looked very sharp on the ball.","html":"At the start of the Birds' game against Maties, both teams looked very sharp on the ball."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home side displayed great touches on the ball, looking for scoring chances.","html":"The home side displayed great touches on the ball, looking for scoring chances."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Birds players pushed virtually every ball up front, looking for an opening goal, but it was not easy for them to break through the Maties' back line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Birds seek support","html":"Birds seek support"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maties managed to score, resulting in the Birds losing vital points.","html":"Maties managed to score, resulting in the Birds losing vital points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The chairman of Oriented Birds, Zitho Lawrence Tyontwana, said the club was in need of support from local businesses.","html":"The chairman of Oriented Birds, Zitho Lawrence Tyontwana, said the club was in need of support from local businesses."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the team travelled a lot, and support from businesses would give the team a boost in their campaign in the provincial league.","html":"He said the team travelled a lot, and support from businesses would give the team a boost in their campaign in the provincial league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe - this past weekend's results:","html":"Safa Western Cape ABC Motsepe - this past weekend's results:"},{"type":"list","items":["Cape Town Spurs 1-2 Grassy Park United FC","FN Rangers 0-1 Junction Rovers FC","Zizwe United 5-0 Diaz Leeds","Ubuntu Football 5-0 City Kings","Young Bafana 4-3 Crystal Palace","Maties 1-0 Oriented Birds","Salim United 1-1 Hanover Park United FC","Barcelona 0-4 Royal Blues","Mbekweni Cosmos 0-1 Santos FC"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
